content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Music for YouTube Videos in 2026

Finding the perfect music for YouTube videos is hard, and copyright issues are a nightmare. AI music generation is the solution!

Explore our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## Step 1: Generate Music with [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]

[[link:/tools/200|Suno]] creates original music from text descriptions. Tell it what mood you want, and it composes!

### Getting Started with Suno
- **Describe your mood**: "upbeat", "calm", "dramatic", etc.
- **Specify genre**: Pop, rock, ambient, cinematic
- **Customize length**: Match your video duration

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## Step 2: Edit and Adjust

Once you have your music, use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] to edit and adjust it to fit your video perfectly.

### Editing AI Music
- **Trim to length**: Match your video perfectly
- **Adjust levels**: Balance music with dialogue
- **Add effects**: Fade in/out, crossfade

---

## Step 3: Add to Your Video

Import your AI-generated music into [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] or your favorite video editor and sync it with your footage.

---

## Why AI Music for YouTube?

- **100% original**: No copyright claims
- **Custom**: Music that fits your exact needs
- **Cost-effective**: Free or low-cost alternatives to licensing

Ready to add unique music to your YouTube videos? Try [[link:/tools/200|Suno]] today!

For more insights, check out [[link:/blog/best-ai-video-tools-for-youtube-creators-2026|Best AI Video Tools for YouTube Creators]]
